titleStmt.title: SII 35.11: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 11. (A.R. No. 50 of 1950-51.) BAICHAVAḶḶI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Hero-stone set up near the Basavaṇṇa temple.
This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tailapadēva is dated in Śaka 902, (wrong for 907) Pārthiva, Jyēshṭha kṛishṇa 8, Sunday, corresponding to 985 A.D., June 28.

This records the death, in a cattle-raid, of Bīḍi Chaṭṭayya, son of Sivayya who was the disciple of Āriya Bhaṭāra, when Sōbhanarasa was governor, Eṟegāri was holding the office of Nāḷ-gāmuṇḍu of the Five-hundred villages, Sōmēśvaradāsi Aniyamma was administering aṇugarājya and Bāradara Ereyamma and Kadugayya were in charge of Ūr-gāmuṇḍu. The memorial stone was set up by sthānapati Śivarāsi-bhāṭāra. Chāmuṇḍayya composed the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: jitēna labhyatē lakṣumi mrutēnāpi surāṁgana kṣaṇavidvaṁsani kāyē kā ciṁtyā maraṇē raṇē .

© svasti śrītailapadēva pṛthuvīrājyaṁgeyye sōbhanarasannada nāḍi Eṟa
gāriAynūṟu bāḍakannālgavuṇḍageyye sōmēśvaradāsi Aṇiyamma naṇu
ga rājyaṁ geyyu bāradara Ereyammanu kaḍugayyanu Ūrggāmuṇḍageyye sakanṛpa
kāḷātītasaṁvatsarasataṁga 902 neya pārtiva saṁvatsara jēṣṭhamāsa kṛṣṇaṣṭami
Ādityavāradandu śrīmatĀriyabhaṭāraka śiṣyarappa sivayyana maga

bīḍicaṭṭayya nūraAivanu haṁtuṟugāḷuḍuṁ pogalāgadindidivdi sattu svarga
lārakke sarnda niṭṭūriyāgi tāgida kaṭṭaḷgaṁḍa niṟidu maḍidoḍaccarasivi
rastiṭṭa vimāna dūḍuydannaṭṭani karitanada jaṭṭigaṁ bidivavaḷda
Aṣṭāya suṭṭiya sthānapati śivanarāsibhaṭārara kallaniḍisidar
cāmuṇḍayya kandava baḻdaba kādaṁ maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 35.11 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
